message:
feat(core): add beads_rust (br) subprocess bridge for task tracking

BeadsBridge wraps the br CLI via SubprocessBridge for querying issue
state.  Includes beads_types.rs with vendored BeadSummary, BeadStatus,
BeadPriority types, status counts, and backpressure tier mapping
(Green/Yellow/Red).  All calls fail-open when br is unavailable.
49 unit tests.

Also adds binary_name() accessor to SubprocessBridge.

Closes ft-3ejvf.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
